creator: rigoletto@freebsd.org
text:
Unfortunately it is not possible to update devel/gps now. The 2017 version depends on libadalang that depends on the 2017 version of devel/gnatcoll.

The gnacoll source code was removed from GitHub ( and from AdaCore page ) because it was broken into three parts ( gnatcoll-core, gnatcoll-bindings, gnatcoll-db ), and those new separated versions fail to add -lgnat and -lgnarl flags where it should ( as I learned on Ravenports ).

Thanks!
